segments.speaker: SALLY
segments.en: We'll look forward to hearing from you.
segments.zh: 我们期待您的来信。再见。

segments.speaker: SALLY
segments.en: Goodbye.

segments.speaker: JOHN
segments.en: Goodbye, and thank you.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: It's great to see so many members of the Twinning Association here tonight.
segments.zh: 很高兴今晚看到这么多结对协会的成员。自从我们两个城镇——英国的斯坦索普和法国的马拉特——建立结对联系以来，两地关系日益加强。上个月，斯坦索普协会的25名成员在马拉特度过了一个周末。我们的东道主安排了一个很棒的节目。我们了解了该地区奶酪的制作过程，并有机会品尝产品。主题公园之旅不得不取消，但最后的河上游船之旅我们都玩得很开心——那才是真正的亮点。今年对协会来说是特殊的一年，因为我们已经成立25年了。在马拉特，他们计划通过在市政公园修建一座人行桥来纪念这一时刻。我们一直在讨论在这里做什么，我们决定在博物馆花园里种一棵杨树。我们考虑过买一张花园长椅放在那里，但当局对这个想法不满意。在筹款支持我们的活动方面，我们做得很好。我们的煎饼晚会参加人数众多，创下了创纪录的利润。每个人都喜欢法国烹饪演示，这也几乎同样成功。由于场地限制，我们的电影放映人数有限，所以明年我们要找一个更大的地方。我们期待着下周欢迎我们的法国游客，我知道你们中的许多人将接待个人或家庭。来自法国的巴士将于周五下午5点到达。第一个晚上不要安排太多活动，因为他们会累，所以在家里或花园里吃晚饭，而不是出去吃。天气看起来不错，所以你可以计划烧烤。第二天早上是镇上的集市日，那总是个散步的好地方。周六晚上，我们将在足球俱乐部聚会，托比·夏普和他的乐队将再次表演英国和苏格兰乡村歌曲。你们中的许多人已经很熟悉托比了，因为他去年组织了我们特别的问答之夜并颁发了奖品。周日，我们将带我们的游客去法利庄园。你们可能不都熟悉它，所以这里有一张地图帮助你们。你们可以看到地图底部的停车场。庄园里有一个很棒的农场商店，我们的游客可以在那里购买当地农产品——它在旧马厩里，那是你遇到的第一个建筑。它们围绕一个庭院建造，商店在左角的远处。进去时右边还有一个小咖啡馆。

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: Since the twinning link between our two towns, Stanthorpe here in England and Malatte in France, was established, the relationship between the towns has gone from strength to strength.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: Last month, 25 members of the association from Stanthorpe spent a weekend in Malatte.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: Our hosts had arranged a great programme.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: We learned how cheese is produced in the region and had the chance to taste the products.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: The theme park trip had to be cancelled, but we all had a great time on the final boat trip down the river – that was the real highlight.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: This is a special year for the Association because it's 25 years since we were founded.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: In Malatte, they're planning to mark this by building a footbridge in the municipal park.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: We've been discussing what to do here and we've decided to plant a poplar tree in the museum gardens.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: We considered buying a garden seat to put there, but the authorities weren't happy with that idea.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: In terms of fundraising to support our activities, we've done very well.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: Our pancake evening was well attended and made record profits.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: And everyone enjoyed the demonstration of French cookery, which was nearly as successful.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: Numbers for our film show were limited because of the venue so we're looking for somewhere bigger next year.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: We're looking forward to welcoming our French visitors here next week, and I know that many of you here will be hosting individuals or families.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: The coach from France will arrive at 5 pm on Friday.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: Don't try to do too much that first evening as they'll be tired, so have dinner in the house or garden rather than eating out.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: The weather looks as if it'll be OK so you might like to plan a barbecue.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: Then the next morning's market day in town, and that's always a good place to stroll round.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: On Saturday evening, we'll all meet up at the football club, where once again we'll have Toby Sharp and his band performing English and Scottish country songs.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: Toby will already be well known to many of you as last year he organised our special quiz night and presented the prizes.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: Now on Sunday, we'll be taking our visitors to Farley House.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: You may not all be familiar with it, so here's a map to help you.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: You can see the car park at the bottom of the map.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: There's an excellent farm shop in the grounds where our visitors can buy local produce – it's in the old stables, which is the first building you come to.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: They've built round a courtyard, and the shop's in the far corner on the left.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: There's also a small café on the right as you go in.

items.prompt: During the visit to Malatte, in France, members especially enjoyed

pairs.note: 题干说'特别享受'，原文用'the real highlight'（真正的亮点）表达相同意思。

paraphrase.explain: 题干问成员特别享受什么，定位到原文描述访问Malatte的段落，其中提到'final boat trip down the river – that was the real highlight'，因此答案选B（boat trip）。

items.prompt: What will happen in Stanthorpe to mark the 25th anniversary of the Twinning Association?

pairs.p: we've decided to plant a poplar tree
pairs.note: 题干问事件，原文用'decided to plant'说明具体行动

paraphrase.explain: 定位到'This is a special year...'后，听到'we've decided to plant a poplar tree'即为答案。

items.prompt: Which event raised most funds this year?

pairs.note: 'raised most funds' 对应 'made record profits'，表示筹款最多。

paraphrase.explain: 题干问今年哪个活动筹款最多，定位到 'this year' 和 'made record profits'，对应 'pancake evening'。

items.prompt: For the first evening with the French visitors host families are advised to

pairs.note: 题干和原文完全一致，直接定位到该时间点。

pairs.p: Don't try to do too much that first evening as they'll be tired, so have dinner in the house or garden rather than eating out.
pairs.note: 原文用'Don't...rather than'给出建议，与题干'advised to'对应，建议在家或花园吃晚饭而非外出。

paraphrase.explain: 根据题干关键词'first evening'定位到原文'first evening'处，其后建议内容'have dinner in the house or garden rather than eating out'即为答案依据。

items.prompt: On Saturday evening there will be the chance to

pairs.note: 时间完全一致，直接定位

pairs.p: we'll all meet up at the football club, where once again we'll have Toby Sharp and his band performing
pairs.note: 题干说有机会做某事，原文具体说明活动内容，是概括与具体的替换

paraphrase.explain: 题干问周六晚上有什么机会，定位句明确提到'Saturday evening'，后面紧跟活动描述，直接对应选项A。

pairs.note: 题干和原文完全一致，直接定位到该词。

paraphrase.explain: 题干Farm shop在原文中直接出现，且位于描述Farley House的部分，因此答案对应地图上的位置G。

items.prompt: The Temple of the Four Winds
